title: Numerical solution of equations
summary: 9709 P3 — change of sign, iteration, and Newton–Raphson with GeoGebra root-finding graph.
learningObjectives: Locate roots using sign change in an interval.

simpleExplanation.title: When algebra fails
simpleExplanation.summary: Numerical methods approximate roots. Iteration x_{n+1} = g(x_n) converges if |g′(x)| < 1 near the root.
steps: Choose g(x) so iteration moves toward root.
Show at least 3 iterations for full marks.

sections.content: **Numerical methods** (3.6) require **clear iteration tables**. State **failure** if divergence — do not hide bad iterates.
